Assumptions & Audit Trail

Active Configuration

StandardLotUSD$500
StalenessThreshold60s
ResolutionWindowHours72h
SlippageCeiling5%
MatchConfidenceThreshold0.65
KalshiFeeMultiplier0.07
PolymarketPeakTakerFee1.56%
PolymarketFeeFloor0.1%
TitleWeight0.60
DateWeight0.25
CategoryWeight0.15

Matching Reasoning (Top 5)

[1] Fed emergency rate cut before 2027?

TitleScore=0.857 (Jaccard on "2027 before cut emergency federal rate reserve" vs "2027 before cut federal rate reserve") DateScore=0.799 (resolution delta = 29.0h, window = 72h×2) CategoryScore=1.000 ("economics" vs "economics") Confidence=0.864 (0.60×title + 0.25×date + 0.15×cat)

[2] Will US GDP growth in Q1 2026 be greater than 3…

TitleScore=0.538 (Jaccard on "2026 3 5 first gdp greater growth quarter than us" vs "2026 3 5 first gdp increase more quarter real than") DateScore=0.913 (resolution delta = 12.5h, window = 72h×2) CategoryScore=1.000 ("economics" vs "economics") Confidence=0.701 (0.60×title + 0.25×date + 0.15×cat)

[3] Will US GDP growth in Q1 2026 be less than 1.0%?

TitleScore=0.538 (Jaccard on "0 1 2026 first gdp growth less quarter than us" vs "0 1 2026 first gdp increase more quarter real than") DateScore=0.913 (resolution delta = 12.5h, window = 72h×2) CategoryScore=1.000 ("economics" vs "economics") Confidence=0.701 (0.60×title + 0.25×date + 0.15×cat)

[4] Fed abolished before 2027?

TitleScore=0.571 (Jaccard on "2027 abolished before federal reserve" vs "2027 before cut federal rate reserve") DateScore=0.799 (resolution delta = 29.0h, window = 72h×2) CategoryScore=1.000 ("economics" vs "economics") Confidence=0.693 (0.60×title + 0.25×date + 0.15×cat) PolarityInverted=true (XOR negation token detected)

[5] Will US GDP growth in Q1 2026 be between 1.0% a…

TitleScore=0.500 (Jaccard on "0 1 2026 5 and first gdp growth more quarter us" vs "0 1 2026 first gdp increase more quarter real than") DateScore=0.913 (resolution delta = 12.5h, window = 72h×2) CategoryScore=1.000 ("economics" vs "economics") Confidence=0.678 (0.60×title + 0.25×date + 0.15×cat)

Known Limitations

Known V1 Matcher Limitations

Marginal matches near the confidence threshold (0.65–0.72) may produce false positives where semantically unrelated markets share enough surface-level tokens to score above threshold. Example observed in live data: "Fed abolished before 2027?" (Polymarket) matched to KXRATECUT-26DEC31 (Kalshi) at 0.69 confidence due to shared "fed" and date proximity tokens. A price-proximity sanity check (flag matches where venue prices diverge >50 percentage points) is the recommended V2 mitigation.
PROJECT EQUINOX — Go 1.21+All market data baked in at generation time — no external requests on load
